nasb.text: And His disciples asked Him, “Why then do the scribes say that Elijah must come first?”

esv.text: And the disciples asked him, “Then why do the scribes say that first Elijah must come?”

cnv.text: 門徒就問他：“那麼經學家為甚麼說，以利亞必須先來呢？”

ccb.text: 门徒问耶稣：“律法教师为什么说以利亚必须先来？”

csbs.text: 门徒们问耶稣，说：“那么，经文士们为什么说以利亚必须先来呢？”
